page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn8ia-m24.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance configured on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor operating at 3.4 GHz. The instance provides 48 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

For accelerated workloads, the instance includes a single NVIDIA GPU from the Ada Lovelace architecture family, providing 24 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is not bundled with this instance type, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

This hardware profile offers a balanced allocation of dedicated compute resources and GPU acceleration, making it suitable for workloads that require parallel processing without massive local storage requirements. The dedicated core configuration eliminates resource contention at the CPU level, which is beneficial for predictable execution. Appropriate workloads include GPU-accelerated rendering, machine learning inference, video transcoding, and compute-heavy simulations that utilize the Ada Lovelace architecture.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn8ia-m24.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 192.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and does not include local storage. Graphics and parallel computing acceleration are delivered via a single NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPU with 24 GB of VRAM. Network performance is defined by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This instance is designed for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources and GPU acceleration, such as machine learning inference, 3D rendering, and parallelized compute tasks, offering a balanced resource density without hyperthreading overhead.

tagline: A dedicated forty-eight core compute platform featuring hardware acceleration via an NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPU and high-frequency AMD EPYC processing.
bullet_points: Powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor with 48 dedicated physical cores at 3.4 GHz.
Equipped with one NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPU featuring 24 GB of dedicated VRAM.
Configured with 192 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core.
Delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps on the KVM hypervisor.
Requires external block storage as no local storage is bundled with the instance.
Suited for machine learning inference, parallel computing, and GPU-accelerated rendering.
